The native leaves the job and wanders over non-beneficial jobs
like a phakir or half-baked sanyasi, keeps wandering and not
staying at any place and in any job.
SATURN+M ARS+
MOON+D.HEAD .. Although the native will be having a
good/job, accusation will be there-
even symptoms for imprisonment
during career may peep in,
(although imprisonment may not
materialise).
MOON+MARS+D.TAIL+
SATURN+ VENUS Native lands in various jobs-suffers
due to Trobules after many ordeals.
He may get some permanent
footing in career. (Or it indicates
that the native may enjoy beneficial
factors after marriage).
MARS+DRAGON TAlL+
MOON+SATURN .. The native works in a country and
after enormous hardship will have to
go to some other country and there

68 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
he enjoys prosperity. Here aspect
